typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		project_id as string,
		ID as string,
		ProjectID as boolean,
		Code as string,
		Name as string,
		DefaultCrewSize as string,
		PF_Planned as string,
		PF_Actual as string,
		PF_RollingPeriods as string,
		MaxWorkPackThreshold as string,
		MinWorkPackThreshold as string,
		CreatedByID as string,
		CreatedDate as string,
		ModifiedByID as string,
		ModifiedDate as string,
		FirstImportID as string,
		LastImportID as string,
		SubPrime as string,
		IsActive as boolean,
		SPMDiscipline as string,
		MaterialCategoryID as string,
		temp_id as boolean
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	wildcardPaths:['Project_Data/NCSA/SitePro/SR/sitepro_sr.csv']) ~> srcStageToRawSR
srcStageToRawSR derive(FileName = concat( 'Project_Data/NCSA/SitePro/SR/',        
        substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),        
        '/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),        
        '/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),        
        '/',        'sr_sitepro_',        
        replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),        
        '.csv')) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	rowUrlColumn:'FileName',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	mapColumn(
		project_id,
		ID,
		ProjectID,
		Code,
		Name,
		DefaultCrewSize,
		PF_Planned,
		PF_Actual,
		PF_RollingPeriods,
		MaxWorkPackThreshold,
		MinWorkPackThreshold,
		CreatedByID,
		CreatedDate,
		ModifiedByID,
		ModifiedDate,
		FirstImportID,
		LastImportID,
		SubPrime,
		IsActive,
		SPMDiscipline,
		MaterialCategoryID,
		temp_id,
		FileName
	)) ~> destSRRAW
